name: EdwLfstylRateFctrRunCycUpdt

text.value: WITH cte_sel AS (SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.RunCycle} GROUP BY TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD) UPDATE p SET p.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC p JOIN cte_sel c ON p.TRGT_SYS_CD = c.TRGT_SYS_CD AND p.SRC_SYS_CD = c.SRC_SYS_CD AND p.SUBJ_CD = c.SUBJ_CD WHERE p.RUN_CYC_NO >= c.RUN_CYC_NO AND p.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N';

Annotations:
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for that one particular run cycle
JobName:
EdwLfstylRateFctrRunCycUpdt
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR with a value "N" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN  where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle
buffer
